metadata.note: Conversation about using Windsurf as dry-run for 8825 task specs, then handing to Goose as execution layer; includes scanned-letter→OCR→8825→deadline→calendar use case.

content.summary: User and assistant aligned on a two-layer automation pattern: 8825 produces explicit, execution-ready task specs (in Windsurf) and Goose acts on them locally via MCP. This preserves 8825 as the brain/context layer and uses Goose as the arms/legs layer. We also validated a concrete business-style use case: scanned letter is OCR'd, run through 2 LLM passes (context/routing via 8825, then deadline extraction), and then an agent creates calendar events for the target recipient.
highlights: Windsurf is a viable 'dry lab' for testing and refining 8825 workflows before execution.
Goose should receive explicit JSON task specs: meta → task → io → steps → payload.
8825 remains the source of truth for structure; Goose should not infer schema.
Scanned-letter flow: scan → OCR → 8825 context pass → narrow deadline pass → calendar write.
User intent: make 8825 the brain they already designed and let Goose give LLMs 'arms and legs'.

artifacts.name: 8825_to_goose_task_spec_base
artifacts.description: Base shape for 8825→Goose handoff defined in convo.

task.name: update_joju_library
task.description: Append new achievement objects mined from chat to the joju library on disk.

artifacts.name: 8825_to_goose_task_spec_create_if_missing
artifacts.description: Guarded version that creates target JSON if missing.

task.name: ensure_joju_library_and_update
task.description: Check for joju library file; create with base schema if missing; then append new achievements.

scan_letter_use_case.description: Automated processing of scanned/uploaded letters with deadlines.
steps: Detect new file in scan/upload folder.
Run 8825 context pass to route to RAL/HCSS/JH based on text.
Run dedicated deadline extractor pass to produce normalized dates.
Agent (Goose) creates calendar event(s) for target recipient and moves original scan to 'processed'.
scan_letter_use_case.safety: If deadline language is relative ('within 10 days'), mark as needs_human=true and create a draft event only.
